MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-10-2007 Continued To Jan-17-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
MARIA NAPITAN, 504-4595, MOVING PARTY IS APPEARING IN PROPERIA PERSONA

No other appearances on this matter. DEFENDANT STATED THAT SHE WAS NOT SERVED WITH THE OPPOSING PAPERS. THE COURT FOUND THAT THE PROOF OF SERVICE WAS VALID. DEFENDANT AGREED TO WAIVE ARGUMENT. The COURT CONTINUED DEFENDANT MARIA NAPITAN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT TO JANUARY 17, 2007. DEFENDANT MUST FILE A REPLY BY THE END OF THE BUSINESS DAY ON JANUARY 17, 2007, AT WHICH TIME THE MATTER WILL BE DEEMED SUBMITTED. DEFENDANT MUST SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER FOR THE COURT'S CONSIDERATION. (301/PJB/CK) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
